utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Now, check the final property solution: 
1) property: Present with full details including address, price, bed/bath, lot size, type, year built, features, and school district — fully specified.
2) financing: Present with type, LTV, loan amount, arrangement fee, estimated monthly payment, term, and equity used — fully specified.
3) legal_services: Present with provider, legal fee, and survey fee — fully specified.
4) moving_services: Present with provider, service level, and cost — fully specified.
5) setup_services: Present with electricity/water, gas, and internet details including providers, fees, and activation/installation timeframes — fully specified.
6) total_budget: Present with one_time_costs breakdown, total_one_time, monthly_costs breakdown, and total_monthly — fully specified.
All 6 items are covered fully with the required details.
